issues.description: Condition checks 'HasCardOnBoard' (board presence) but text says 'have a face-up Life card' which refers to Life zone. Should be a Life-specific condition or clarified differently.

Three separate SearchDeck actions implies playing all three characters if available. Text says 'play up to 1' (singular, one card total from the three options). Should be a single action with OR filter or consolidated multi-name filter with limit=1.
SearchDeck with 'ByName' searches deck only, but text says 'from your hand or trash'. Should use a filter that includes hand and trash sources, or use PlayFromHand/TrashFromHand actions instead.
No cost filter applied. Text specifies 'cost of 2' but DSL does not restrict to that cost.
